stem: A SaaS analytics study surveys 30 subscribers and observes 7 positive outcomes out of 30 (23.3%). Estimate the true customer churn rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.2333. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1179, 0.4093]. Point estimate: 0.2636.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
Not recognizing that with n=30, the normal approximation may be poor
